mapper.sql: FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, NVL(p.likes, 0) AS likeCount, p.img_src AS imageSrc, p.created_at AS createdAt,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked
0 AS liked
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, NVL(p.likes, 0) AS likeCount, p.img_src AS imageSrc, p.created_at AS createdAt,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked
0 AS liked
ORDER BY NVL(p.likes, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes ( user_id, post_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{postId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET likes = NVL(likes, 0) + 1, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET likes = GREATEST(NVL(likes, 0) - 1, 0), updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(likes, 0) FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
